texto: In the Reggio Emilia preschools, however, each child is viewed as infinitely capable, creative, and intelligent. The job of the teacher is to support these qualities and to challenge children in appropriate ways so that they develop fully.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Louise Boyd Cadwell sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “In the Reggio Emilia preschools, however, each child is viewed as infinitely capable, creative, a…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, education, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
